name: local-readonly-helper
description: Versioned local read-only helper tools for workspace inspection and debugging.

tools.name: workspace_readiness
tools.description: Read startup, validation, Git, and delivery health for the current workspace.

tools.name: project_doctor
tools.description: Run the local Project Doctor summary without writing files or remote state.

tools.name: repo_map
tools.description: Read the current repository structure and symbol summary.

trust.notes: Versioned local manifest. Execution still requires explicit approval and only bridges to built-in read-only tools.
